chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-328 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of bail application 11-09-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** Applicant, present on interim pre-arrest bail, has been acquitted by the trial Court in the very offence. A judgment dated 21.08.2023 has been filed by defence counsel, who states that he is not pressing this bail application and also seeks return of surety, which learned Deputy P.G has not objected. This bail application is dismissed as not pressed. Let surety papers be returned to surety after proper verification, identification and as per rules. JUDGE Ahmad
